title: Ravenwolf's Cobblemon Create
description: Modpack combining Cobblemon, Create, and Adventure/Exploration mods. Featuring some nice QoL mods perfect for SMP with friends.
body:
A modpack that combines Cobblemon with Create and a few exploration/adventure mods along the way. Includes a few QoL and Aesthetic mods to enhance immersion without straying too far from simple vanilla Minecraft principles. Perfect combination for Cobblemon/Create SMP with friends!

# Mods:
_This list does not include every mod, just the ones that impact gameplay the most._

## 	Core:
**Cobblemon** - Pkmn-inspired mod that integrates naturally with vanilla Minecraft.

**Create** - Mechanical automation mod that adds steampunk-esque contraptions to enable building of complex factories and kinetic builds.

## 	Cobblemon Addons:
**Cobblemon Integrations** - Bridges Cobblemon with other mods (JEI, Jade, etc).

**Cobblemon Move Inspector** - View Cobblemon movesets and details directly in battle menu.

**Cobblemon Pokenav** - Adds navigation tools for finding Cobblemon.

**Cobblemon Spawn Alerts** - Notifies players of specific Cobblemon spawns.

**Cobblemon: CobbleStats** - Displays battle stats such as weather, hazards, and terrain boosts during fights.

**Cobblemon: Mega Showdown** - Adds Mega Evolutions, Z-Moves, Dynamax, and fusions.

**Cobbreeding** - Implements Cobblemon breeding via pasture blocks.

**Cobblemon Journey Mounts** - Expands the amount of rideable Cobblemon.

**Cobble Loots** - Spawns Loot Balls that can be found for Cobblemon related loot.

**E19 Cobblemon Minimap Icons** - Resource pack that adds Cobblemon icons to Xaero's Minimap.

**Myths and Legends** - Introduces legendary Cobblemon encounters tied to key items.

**SimpleTMs** - Adds Technical Machines and Records to teach Cobblemon moves.


## 	Create Addons:
**Create: Copycats+** - Expands decorative building with extra variants of Create "copycat" blocks.

**Create: Dragons Plus** - Adds bulk processing mechanics using Create fans and fluids.

**Create Enchantment Industry** - Automates enchanting with Create contraptions like enchanters, grindstones, and liquid XP storage.

**Create: Sound of Steam** - Adds pipe organs and musical contraptions powered by Create's mechanics.

**Create: Storage Drawers compat** - Integrates Create with Storage Drawers.


## 	Generation:
**Tectonic** - Overhauls terrain generation with massive continents, cliffs, and realistic landforms.

**Terralith** - Adds 95+ new vanilla-style biomes, enhanced caves, and terrain features.

**Dungeon Crawl** - Generates sprawling underground dungeons with randomized layouts and mobs.

**Luki's Structure Mods** - Revamps villages and illager structures into grand capitals and unique settlements.

**Moog's End & Nether Structure Mods** - Expands End and Nether dimension structures.

**Yung's Generation & Structure Mods** - Redesigns vanilla structures (caves, dungeons, mineshafts, strongholds, and monuments) to be more complex and grand.


## 	Building/Items/Tech:
**Chipped** - Adds thousands of vanilla-style decorative block variants via unique crafting tables.

**Cluttered** - Introduces furniture, decor, and themed items inspired by games like Animal Crossing and Terraria.

**Gliders** - Adds different tiers of vanilla friendly gliders that can be used for easier traversal.

**Handcrafted** - 250+ Furniture pieces from chairs and benches to desks and tables.

**Nature's Compass** - A tool to locate any biome in the world.

**Relics** - Adds unique magical items with abilities that can be upgraded over time.

**RPG Loot** - Adds uniquely enchanted vanilla items to mob and structure loot pools.

**Storage Drawers** - Compact, interactive storage blocks for organizing large quantities of items.

**Supplementaries** - Vanilla+ additions like jars, signposts, faucets, cannons, and decorative redstone gadgets.

**Waystones** - Teleportation system using craftable waystones, warp scrolls, and stones.


## 	QoL/Enhancements:
**Better Combat** -  Improved fighting and sword-play mechanics inspired by Minecraft Dungeons.

**Better Days** - Longer day cycle with replaced vanilla sleep functionality that accelerates time instead of skipping it.

**Boundless: Quests** - Questing framework to add custom quests to the modpack that guide progress. !Needs to be configured yet!

**Controllify** - Adds advanced controller support and configuration. !Needs to be configured yet!

**Corpse** - Spawns a corpse on death containing your inventory to safely retrieve.

**Distant Horizons** - Extends render distance with level-of-detail terrain.

**Dynamic Surroundings** - Enhances atmosphere with extra sounds and effects.

**Easy Anvils, Easy Magic, Easy Shulker Boxes** - QoL tweaks: improved anvils, streamlined enchanting, and inventory-accessible shulkers.

**Lootr** - Makes loot containers instanced per player, ensuring everyone gets their share of unique rewards.

**Open Parties and Claims** - Claiming and Party system to protect your builds or team up with friends.

**Simple Voice Chat** - Proximity-based voice chat.

**Sound Physics Remastered** - Realistic sound with echo, occlusions, and absorption.


## 	Resourcepacks/Shaders:
**Immersive Interfaces** - Revamps Minecraft's inventory GUI with themed scenes for each different interface. 

**Complementary Shaders Reimagined** - High-quality shader pack optimized for performance.
